title: Charred French Blackberries Salad
description: A sweet, snappy brunch salad featuring charred blackberries, red onion, mint, and a tangy balsamic glaze, served in a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Wash the blackberries and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, toss the blackberries with olive oil, sea salt, and black pepper.
Place the prepared berries on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until lightly charred.
While the berries are grilling, thinly slice the red onion.
In a large bowl, combine the charred blackberries, sliced onion, and mint leaves.
Add the lemon juice and balsamic glaze to the bowl and gently toss everything together.
Transfer the salad onto a bamboo tray for serving.
Sprinkle fresh thyme leaves over the top of the salad.
Serve immediately as a fresh, low-calorie brunch dish.
